title: Grit
subtitle: The Power of Passion and Perseverance
author: Angela Duckworth
excerpt: Why do some people achieve more than others? The secret isn't talent — it's a special blend of passion and persistence that Angela Duckworth calls grit. Drawing on groundbreaking research at West Point, the National Spelling Bee, and beyond, Duckworth shows that effort counts twice as much as talent in determining success.
